name: recoil
description: Operational memory for coding agents: recall past mistakes before you act, encode the lesson when something goes wrong.

interface.longDescription: Recoil remembers what went wrong in your dev loop — a failed command, a revert, a correction — and surfaces it before you hit it again. A local CLI backed by a plain-text store; no embeddings, no network. The skill teaches the agent to recall and guard before it acts, and to encode a lesson whenever the loop is surprised.
defaultPrompt: Recall any past mistakes for the files I'm about to change
